[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011000010 3
1 0000000001 1
2 0000000000 a
3 1000101100 4
4 0011000010 3
5 0000000001 1
6 0110000001 3
7 1000100000 2

01 10 1110100001 5
12 21 0000000011 2
23 32 0000000001 1 match 1 5
34 43 0000000000 a match 2
45 54 0000001000 1
56 65 0000000000 a match 2
67 76 0000000000 a match 2
70 07 0010000000 1

02 20 0000001101 3
13 31 0100000001 2
24 42 0000001100 2
35 53 0000000000 a match 2
46 64 1000000000 1
57 75 0010000010 2
60 06 1000000001 2
71 17 0010000010 2

03 30 0100000001 2
14 41 1000100000 2 match 7
25 52 0000001010 2
36 63 0000000001 1 match 1 5
47 74 0000000000 a match 2
50 05 0010001000 2
61 16 1000000001 2
72 27 0000000010 1

04 40 1000101100 4 match 3
15 51 0011000010 3 match 0 4
26 62 0000000001 1 match 1 5
37 73 0000000000 a match 2
